ol.li: Detection: CPU detects interrupt or exception.
TSS Lookup: CPU accesses the Task Register (TR) to find the current TSS.
Stack Switch: SS and ESP are loaded with TSS.SS0 and TSS.ESP0.

Push Sequence:
User SS (pushed to new stack)
User ESP
EFLAGS
User CS
User EIP
Error Code (if applicable)
Handler: CPU loads new CS:EIP from IDT.

g.title: Task State Segment (TSS) used to find Kernel Stack
Task State Segment (TSS) used to find Kernel Stack
